describe: DL-22 workspace quotas: deterministic size accounting + a trusted policy (const default + persisted override) + reject-not-delete enforcement on the real write path + content-hash attachment dedup + a non-blocking approaching-limit warning. Driven by forge-storage/tests/quota_fixtures.rs.

assert_kinds.decision: decide_quota(usage, policy, category, applet, write_bytes) must equal the listed decision (Ok / approaching / over_quota) and name the listed scope/limit
assert_kinds.enforce: on the REAL DL-4 records write path, with the listed policy override, the listed mutation must be accepted or rejected; a rejected write leaves prior records + accounted usage byte-intact
assert_kinds.dedup: put_attachment dedups identical bytes to one stored blob (refcounted) and accounts the attachments category once
assert_kinds.report: quota_usage must report the listed per_applet / per_category / workspace_total shape, and two reads must be byte-equal (deterministic)
assert_kinds.policy: quota_policy returns the const DEFAULT or a persisted override; an invalid override is rejected
